description: Evals for the gather phase of the split plan enrichment pipeline. Run in a local model session. Measures completeness, before-block accuracy, module wiring coverage, and TOML validity.

evals.name: completeness
evals.prompt: Run /enrich-plan-gather on a test plan file that mentions at least 2 existing source files.
evals.expected_output: All 6 output files created under notes/plan-enrichment/{plan-slug}/. Each is non-empty. gather-summary.md contains task count, dependency chain, and completeness checklist.
scoring: deferred-and-patterns.md exists (may state 'None found' if no prior phases)
codebase-state.md lists at least one file mentioned in the plan with types/functions
draft-elaboration.md has at least one '## Item:' section with proposed type signatures
draft-plan.toml is parseable TOML with [meta] table and at least one [tasks.TASK-N] table
task-checklist.md has one '## TASK-N:' section per task in draft-plan.toml
gather-summary.md contains task count, dependency chain, and completeness checklist

evals.name: module-wiring
evals.prompt: Run /enrich-plan-gather on a plan that creates at least one new .rs file.
evals.expected_output: Every task that creates a new .rs file includes a [[changes]] entry adding pub mod to the parent module. task-checklist.md confirms wiring for each such task.
scoring: Tasks with type = 'create' for a .rs file include a [[changes]] entry for pub mod in parent lib.rs or mod.rs
If new types are public and cross-crate, task includes a [[changes]] entry for pub use re-export
task-checklist.md 'Module wiring complete' field is 'Yes' for tasks creating new files
No task creating a .rs file has 'Module wiring complete: No' in task-checklist.md without an explanation

evals.name: toml-validity
evals.prompt: Run /enrich-plan-gather on a test plan. Validate the TOML output format.
evals.expected_output: draft-plan.toml parses as valid TOML. All tasks have required fields. All [[changes]] entries have file, before, and after. Task IDs follow TASK-N pattern.
scoring: TOML parses without error (test with: python3 -c "import tomllib; tomllib.load(open('draft-plan.toml', 'rb'))")
Every [tasks.TASK-N] has a 'type' field with value 'replace', 'create', or 'delete'
Every [tasks.TASK-N] has an 'acceptance' array with at least one string element
No 'before' or 'after' field is an empty string
Task IDs match the pattern TASK-[0-9]+ (e.g. TASK-1, TASK-12)
